subtasks.description: Query IAM metadata store to retrieve all roles with elevated permission grants, including permission scope, grant date, and role classification.
Query activity/audit logs to identify all permissions actually exercised by IAM roles in the last 180 days, with action timestamps and permission details.
Reconcile granted permissions against exercised permissions; identify gaps (granted but never used in 180 days), classify permission risk posture, and flag candidates for revocation with rationale.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks, minimum necessary: (1) sql_gen (mid) retrieves elevated IAM role grants from metadata—multi-table join across role definitions and permission tables justifies mid tier; (2) sql_gen (mid) queries activity logs for 180-day exercise history—requires aggregation and filtering but straightforward; (3) cross_recon (frontier) performs the reconciliation—comparing two datasets, identifying gaps, classifying risk, and generating revocation recommendations requires multi-signal analysis and inference, justifying frontier tier. No separate policy_action needed: the reconciliation output itself includes governance posture and revocation flags. No multitool_plan needed: query execution is within sql_gen and mongo_query scope.

output.sql:
SELECT
    al.permission AS granted_permission,
    al.user_id AS iam_role,
    COUNT(*) AS total_access_attempts,
    SUM(CASE WHEN al.result = 'ALLOW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successful_uses,
    SUM(CASE WHEN al.result = 'DENY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS denied_uses,
    MAX(al.access_time) AS last_used_timestamp,
    MIN(al.access_time) AS first_used_timestamp,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN al.result = 'ALLOW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 'REVOCATION_CANDIDATE'
        WHEN MAX(al.access_time) < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' THEN 'STALE_PERMISSION'
        ELSE 'ACTIVE'
    END AS permission_status,
    CASE
        WHEN al.permission ILIKE '%admin%'
            OR al.permission ILIKE '%root%'
            OR al.permission ILIKE '%superuser%'
            OR al.permission ILIKE '%write%'
            OR al.permission ILIKE '%delete%'
            OR al.permission ILIKE '%manage%'
            OR al.permission ILIKE '%grant%' THEN 'ELEVATED'
        ELSE 'STANDARD'
    END AS permission_classification,
    COUNT(DISTINCT al.resource) AS distinct_resources_accessed,
    COUNT(DISTINCT al.action) AS distinct_actions_performed
FROM
    access_log_facts al
WHERE
    al.access_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '180 days'
    AND (
        al.permission ILIKE '%admin%'
        OR al.permission ILIKE '%root%'
        OR al.permission ILIKE '%superuser%'
        OR al.permission ILIKE '%write%'
        OR al.permission ILIKE '%delete%'
        OR al.permission ILIKE '%manage%'
        OR al.permission ILIKE '%grant%'
    )
GROUP BY
    al.user_id,
    al.permission
HAVING
    SUM(CASE WHEN al.result = 'ALLOW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
    OR MAX(al.access_time) < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
ORDER BY
    permission_status DESC,
    al.user_id,
    al.permission

SELECT permission, action, result, COUNT(*) AS exercise_count, MIN(access_time) AS first_used, MAX(access_time) AS last_used, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS distinct_users FROM access_log_facts WHERE access_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '180 days' GROUP BY permission, action, result ORDER BY permission, action, result
